title: Kubernetes Container Orchestration | Rajesh Arigala
paragraphs: Container orchestration for automating the deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications. This includes building and operating production-grade Kubernetes clusters with auto-scaling, self-healing workloads, and rolling updates to enable zero-downtime deployments.
Production-ready Kubernetes implementations demonstrating enterprise-grade orchestration solutions
Machine learning model deployment on Amazon EKS with auto-scaling, load balancing, and production-ready configurations.
Complete Kubernetes configuration for local development and testing environments using Minikube with comprehensive setup.
Native Kubernetes Dashboard implementation for monitoring, metrics analysis, logs, and events management in production clusters.
Interested in implementing production-grade Kubernetes orchestration? Let's discuss how to build scalable, resilient container platforms for your enterprise applications.
content: Kubernetes Container Orchestration Level PROFICIENT 78% Orchestration Scaling Production Container orchestration for automating the deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications. This includes building and operating production-grade Kubernetes clusters with auto-scaling, self-healing workloads, and rolling updates to enable zero-downtime deployments. Projects Showcase Production-ready Kubernetes implementations demonstrating enterprise-grade orchestration solutions AWS AWS EKS ML Deployment Machine learning model deployment on Amazon EKS with auto-scaling, load balancing, and production-ready configurations. Technical Implementation Deploy Infra for EKS through CloudFormation using EKSCTL CLI Deploy ML Model using Docker on Amazon EKS Cluster with KUBECTL CLI Create service cluster/ip, load balancer, invoke endpoint for prediction Testing via local system and Postman Control-plane/master-node managed by AWS, worker-nodes human-controlled Architecture: 2 Pods - ML Model and UI with cluster-ip between pods and load balancer for UI Technologies Used View on GitHub Study Material Local Minikube Local Testing Complete Kubernetes configuration for local development and testing environments using Minikube with comprehensive setup. Technical Implementation Operationalizing AI for Availability and Scalability Local development and testing with Minikube CLI Kubectl CLI for cluster management YAML files for service and deployment configurations Control panel, worker nodes, pods, containers, services, namespaces Architecture: Simple Pod - ML Model with tunnel concept for Minikube/Postman testing Rolling version updates and comprehensive logging Technologies Used View on GitHub Study Material Monitoring Kubernetes Dashboard Native Kubernetes Dashboard implementation for monitoring, metrics analysis, logs, and events management in production clusters. Technical Implementation Native Kubernetes Dashboard deployment for production clusters Comprehensive metrics analysis and visualization Real-time logs streaming and event management Integration with Prometheus for metrics collection Grafana dashboards for advanced monitoring Helm charts for package management and deployment Role-based access control (RBAC) for security Technologies Used View on GitHub Study Material Interested in implementing production-grade Kubernetes orchestration? Let's discuss how to build scalable, resilient container platforms for your enterprise applications. Contact & Collaborate
